text.title: BA Trends Summary Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals (input fields, scores, thresholds) to a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is it a quarterly review window or renewal/CoP trigger?

conclusion.verdict: Halt; do not author the artefact.
Run the trends summary using ≥3 sourced trends with adoption decisions.

example.trace: answer=yes → produce trends checklist for 2026-Q2 with 5 trends.
